query:
SELECT 
  sr.code as role_code,
  sr.label as role_label,
  sb.required_allocation_pct as baseline_pct,
  sb.monthly_rate as baseline_rate,
  cst.proposed_monthly_rate,
  cst.proposed_allocation_pct
FROM cpa_supervision_baseline sb
JOIN cpa_supervision_roles sr ON sr.id = sb.supervision_role_id
JOIN cpa_project_categories pc ON pc.id = sb.project_category_id
LEFT JOIN cpa_consultant_supervision_team cst ON cst.supervision_role_id = sb.supervision_role_id
  AND cst.project_consultant_id = 150015
WHERE pc.code = 'MEGA'
ORDER BY sr.code;
